description: A Class C artifact in which the required_quorum is reached using only attestations from eligible_attesters MUST receive CONSENSUS_VALID status. This status MUST NOT auto-authorize execution (AG1).

input.claim: this action received the required approvals

action_policy.reason: Consensus reached, but execution authorization is separately governed (AG1).

why: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 §3 Class C: required_quorum=2 met by two attestations from eligible attesters → CONSENSUS_VALID. Exercises C1 (rules declared before collection), C2 (only eligible attesters counted), C3 (consensus validity does NOT imply execution authorization — action_allowed remains false), C4, AG1, AG3. Mitigates threat AG-1 (auto-authorization).
